note: This is a non-executable role symmetry fragment. It is not a full maintenance capsule and is not used by the demo runner.

example_interpretation.actor_role: The role that formed or advanced the proposal.
example_interpretation.counterparty_role: The role expected to validate or execute the admissible transition.
example_interpretation.role_transition: The declared transition class from docs/STEGENTITY_ROLE_SYMMETRY.md.
example_interpretation.symmetry_basis: The evidence convergence required before role posture can become action posture.
example_interpretation.completion_invariant_required: Whether StegEntity completion requirements must be satisfied before reporting completion.

blocked_inference: A proposal does not authorize execution.
Adapter capability does not create admissibility.
Dry-run success does not create apply authority.
Platform mutation does not equal StegVerse completion.
